subcodes.first_line: A poem from that eminence was inscribed upon a leaf whereon We had graciously penned Our regard for this servant, and this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شعری از آنجناب بر ورقه که نظر بالتفات این عبد مرقوم فرموده بودیم و این عبد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
